°
°

Fake Certificate
Recognition

Chaviti Sai Leela
2023BTDSO055
B.Tech CSE(AI&DS)

Introduction/Problem Statement

+ The rise in forged and manipulated certificates has become a
major concern for institutions.

+ Manual verification methods are time-consuming and often lack
accuracy.

+ There is a need for an automated system that can reliably
analyze certificate data.

+ This project aims to provide a fast, efficient, and accurate
solution using OCR-based verification.

Objectives of the Project

To automatically extract text from certificates using OCR
technology.
+ To identify signs of tampering or inconsistencies in the
extracted Certificate data.
+ To provide a fast and accurate method for verifying the
authenticity of certificates.
To reduce manual effort and human errors in certificate
validation.
+ To deliver a simple and user-friendly system for uploading and
checking certificates.

(a)

Rotate screen Play Export
